## Test plan

- [ ] `make check` passes (test + lint + fmt)
- [ ] New behaviour covered by deterministic tests
- [ ] Smoke test passes (`make smoke`) if daemon-affecting
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed

## Version bump

- [ ] Patch — bug fix / internal refactor
- [ ] Minor — new backward-compatible feature
- [ ] Major — breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message references the issue (`fixes #N`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added (if user-visible change)
